task: Clean up old test content in Sanity
reason: The request is ambiguous and destructive. No document IDs, content types, age threshold, environment approval, or deletion criteria were provided.

candidateDiscovery.query:
{
  "documentTypeCounts": {
    "page": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "page"]),
    "faq": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "faq"]),
    "socialMedia": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "socialMedia"]),
    "blogArticle": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "blogArticle"]),
    "blog-category": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "blog-category"]),
    "review": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "review"]),
    "reviewAuthor": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "reviewAuthor"]),
    "product": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "product"]),
    "cpoProduct": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "cpoProduct"]),
    "productCategoryParent": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "productCategoryParent"]),
    "productCategorySub": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "productCategorySub"]),
    "store": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "store"]),
    "brand": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "brand"]),
    "teamMember": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "teamMember"]),
    "award": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "award"]),
    "homePage": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "homePage"]),
    "settings": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "settings"]),
    "footer": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "footer"]),
    "navbar": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "navbar"]),
    "redirects": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "redirects"]),
    "privacyPolicy": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "privacyPolicy"]),
    "termsAndConditions": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "termsAndConditions"]),
    "notFound": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "notFound"]),
    "blog": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "blog"]),
    "products": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "products"]),
    "brands": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "brands"]),
    "cpoPage": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "cpoPage"]),
    "comparatorConfig": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type == "comparatorConfig"])
  },
  "candidateCount": count(*[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type in $documentTypes && (
    title match $terms || name match $terms || slug.current match $terms || _id match $terms
  )]),
  "candidates": *[!(_id in path("_.**")) && _type in $documentTypes && (
    title match $terms || name match $terms || slug.current match $terms || _id match $terms
  )] | order(_updatedAt asc)[0...25] {
    _id,
    _type,
    _createdAt,
    _updatedAt,
    title,
    name,
    "slug": slug.current
  }
}

wouldRequireBeforeDeletion: user approval for exact delete mutation
